top_signals.title: Futu, Up Fintech Options Surged Before Crackdown Sparked Slump
top_signals.summary: Trading in US-listed options on Futu Holdings Ltd. and Up Fintech Holding Ltd. surged just before China’s regulator’s announcement that it planned to penalize them triggered a record share slump.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.
